title: AI market likely to split between premium frontier models and lower-cost alternatives: Bernstein

title: India Showcases Startup Ecosystem, AI Leadership & Digital Growth at VivaTech 2026 In Paris | Video
description: India is showcasing its startup ecosystem, expanding digital economy, deep-tech innovation, and artificial intelligence leadership at VivaTech 2026 in Paris, said Piyush Goyal.
